title: Issue search and claim workflow
description:
Groups the issue-search and claim-coordination ergonomics (REQ-07..REQ-09).

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `claim release <issue-id>` releases by issue id regardless of owner (REQ-07).
- [ ] claim-blocked errors name `jit issue assign`, and `--assign-only` exists (REQ-08).
- [ ] `issue search --label` works with an optional query (REQ-09).
